build_name: Antropometri Master v11 — WHO/CDC Split + Klinis IDAI Final
summary: Split WHO/CDC build with audit trail, IDAI clinical lookup tables reintegrated into auto_split, full CDC 2-20 yr coverage, expanded CSV export, and dedicated mode QA.
features: Auto Split / WHO Only Strict / WHO Only Extended App / CDC Only
Auto Split: WHO 0-5 yr (gold standard), CDC 2-20 yr (extended fallback when WHO unavailable)
BBI / WA Clinical IDAI lookup tables wired into auto_split with WHO/CDC fallback
Separated HA/WA/BBI pathways for WHO vs CDC with explicit source labels
Audit trail card in UI with reference detail per metric
Expanded CSV export with mode and source metadata
